help.title: 🛠️ How to use AchieveBot
help.desc: Welcome to the goal tracking bot! Here is how you can manage your progress:
help.active_goals: 1. Create a Goal or progress an active one:
help.create_goal_val:
Use `/create <name>` on desired channel to start tracking a new goal (e.g. `/create steps`).
-# This locks the goal to the channel you created it in.
help.log_progress_val:
Type `$<goal> <amount> [@<user>]` directly in the chat!
**Example:** `$steps 5000` or for someone else `$books 1 @User`
Or use slash command: `/add <goal> <amount> [@<user>]`.
help.set_reminders_val: Use `/notify <goal>` to set up recurring DMs so you never forget to update your progress!
help.footer: Tip: You can use $help or /help to see this message again.
